short: A high-end Gemini model built to reason across text, code, audio, images, and video.
definition: Gemini Omni is a high-end model in Google DeepMind's Gemini family, built to reason across text, code, audio, images, and video in a single system. It is designed for very long context windows that enable repository-scale code analysis and deep video understanding, and supports media generation. It targets demanding multimodal and agentic uses within Google's products.
